payload.answer: Memory card rejected due to unresolved pronoun reference. Requires explicit antecedent specification (e.g., 'John prefers the other one') to comply with durable memory standards.
citations: Brain System Rule: Pronouns must resolve to unambiguous, previously established entities in memory.
Durable Memory Principle: Ambiguity in coreference violates factual integrity.

entity_resolution.reason: Pronoun 'He' lacks antecedent in provided context. Ambiguity violates durable memory preservation rules (strict antecedent resolution required).

details: Pronoun 'He' has no valid antecedent in memory or context.

Action required: Resolve ambiguity or discard.

repair_options: Add antecedent: 'John prefers the other one.'
Delete memory card to prevent false commitments
Request clarification: 'Which entity does 'He' refer to?'
